title: Smooth Craft Texture
description: Smooth Craft is an elegant and refined texture that transforms the Minecraft landscape. With it, all blocks in the game gain a smoother and more polished appearance, ideal for those looking for a more modern and clean aesthetic.
body:
![Smooth Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9bc4775e289fb71f48a186c4cd7090cc696fb6f.png)

Smooth Craft is an elegant and refined texture that transforms the Minecraft landscape. With it, all blocks in the game gain a smoother and more polished appearance, ideal for those looking for a more modern and clean aesthetic. Each texture has been carefully crafted to ensure a pleasant visual experience while maintaining the essence of the game. Get ready to explore the world of Minecraft in a whole new way with Smooth Craft.

Modifications:

All blocks in the game receive a new, smoother and more polished texture, providing a renewed visual experience.
The texture maintains fidelity to the game's original elements, but with a touch of elegance and modernity.
The color palette has been adjusted to ensure visual harmony across all areas of the game, from simple buildings to complex landscapes.
Item and object textures have also been improved to fit the new style, providing a consistent experience throughout the game.
Compatibility:

Smooth Craft is compatible with the latest versions of Minecraft, ensuring players can enjoy the texture in their latest adventures.
The texture is compatible with mods that do not directly change the textures of the blocks, ensuring a consistent experience even with the addition of modifications to the game.
Installation:

To install Smooth Craft, simply download the texture file and place it in the textures folder of your Minecraft client.
Be sure to select the Smooth Craft texture in the game's options menu to start enjoying its smooth, sleek new appearance.
